title: [No application window] mRemoteNG 1.81.0-beta.3 NB 3410
author: krwudtke
body_snippet: mRemoteNG.exe starts (visible in task manager, CPU=0) but application window does not appear. Tested on 3 computers, both x86 and x64-selfcontained ZIPs. Roaming AppData created (themes) but Local AppData not created. Works on beta.2 (NB 3396), fails on beta.3 (NB 3409/3410).

iterations.action: Root cause: Startup.cs field initializer `_frmMain = FrmMain.Default` triggers FrmMain creation before Application.SetHighDpiMode/EnableVisualStyles/SetCompatibleTextRenderingDefault. Caused by new `Startup.Instance.CommandLineArgs = args;` in MainAsync accessing Startup singleton too early. Fix: remove unused _frmMain field.

notes: Regression from beta.2. The _frmMain field was never used — it was dead code that forced premature form creation.
